title: Raasa Raasa Lyrics Vanmham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Raasa Raasa
Singer(s): Suchith Suresan, A.V.Pooja
Music: Thaman.S
Lyricist: Yugabharathi
Movie: Vanmham (2014)

Raasa Raasa ottu raasa
rosaa rosaa pattu rosaa
Raasa Raasa ottu raasa
rosaa rosaa pattu rosaa

Oththa oththa sadaiyila
usuru kollum azhagula
paththa vaikka poren pachcha meniya.
nee kitta vachaa koluthuveney meedhiya.

Chinna chinna idaiyila
sikka vaikkum odayila
vetti thalla poren moththa aasaya
nee muththam vachaa murukkuveney meesaya.

Raasa Raasa ottu raasa
rosaa rosaa pattu rosaa (2)

Paarvaiyaala kaam oosi
podum menagaa naan
moganoi theerndhupoga
pooththa mooligai.

Selaiyaala moodi potta
maada maaliga nee
koodi vaazha thaevayila
yedhu vaadaga.

Raasa Raasa ottu raasa
rosaa rosaa pattu rosaa (2)

Vedhaya vaikkaama
vilaya sollaadha.
vidyum mattum enna
vittu vaikkaadha.

Thiraya kaattaama
chinemaa ottaadha.
sirappa paaru enna sensor pannaadha.

Paasamaana
poovu enna vega vaikkura
nee vaari
enna eduthukkaama enna nogavaikkura.

Koodamaada
serndhidaama kaayavikkura
nee konjam kooda
yosikkaama nee theeya vaikkura.

Raasa Raasa ottu raasa
rosaa rosaa pattu rosaa (2)

Kanave illaadha karumbaa vandhaeney
erumbey enna vittu ettipogaadha.
mudhale podaadha tholila senjeney
kadana solluputtu kattil podaadha.

Kaala neram
paarthidaama enna saapidu
un kaalum kaiyyum
amukka enna konjam koopidu.

veetukkaari
pola enna vachi kaaththidu
nee gaattamaana
muthtthaala kattipottudu.

Raasa Raasa ottu raasa
rosaa rosaa pattu rosaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Raasa Raasa'?

The song 'Raasa Raasa' celebrates love and the joy of being together, filled with playful and romantic lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vanmham'?

In Vanmham, 'Raasa Raasa' is a lively number that showcases the blossoming romance between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Raasa Raasa'?

The song is sung by Monissha MM and composed by Thaman S, known for his energetic and catchy tunes.

When was 'Raasa Raasa' released?

'Raasa Raasa' was released on September 3, 2014, as part of the Vanmham soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Raasa Raasa' from the movie Vanmham is a lively and romantic track that captures the essence of youthful love. With its upbeat tempo and playful lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. The song beautifully portrays the excitement of falling in love, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. Monissha MM's captivating vocals combined with Thaman S's vibrant music create an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Raasa Raasa from the movie Vanmham is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the enchanting vocals of Monissha MM. With Thaman S's catchy composition and Yugabharathi's playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you dancing. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance!
stanzaMeanings: Raasa Raasa, a mix of colors and songs, Raasa Raasa, a blend of colors and songs.
I will showcase beautiful things that take your breath away. If I keep you close, I will take care of you.
In small moments, I will bring joy and happiness. If you give me your love, I will cherish it.
Raasa Raasa, a mix of colors and songs, Raasa Raasa, a blend of colors and songs.
With a glance, I will make you feel the beauty of nature, I will help you overcome your worries with the fragrance of flowers.
If you close the door, you need to live together, what is the need for anything else?
Raasa Raasa, a mix of colors and songs, Raasa Raasa, a blend of colors and songs.
Don't speak of games without purpose. Don't let go of what is important to you.
Don't show me the world without a filter. Look at me, don't censor my feelings.
Like a loving flower, you bring speed to my heart, but you also bring pain without realizing it.
Can we come together and think a little? You are bringing fire without considering the consequences.
Raasa Raasa, a mix of colors and songs, Raasa Raasa, a blend of colors and songs.
I have come like a sugarcane without a dream, don't let go of me. Don't let the first step be lost, don't let the fire go out.
Let's look at the time and eat together, you also call me a little.
Like a housekeeper, you take care of me, you are tightly holding me with love.
Raasa Raasa, a mix of colors and songs, Raasa Raasa, a blend of colors and songs.
